metadata.description: Two-Weeks-Team marketplace hosting the Preview Forge plugin — a 144-agent engineering swarm implementing the 3-DD Methodology (PreviewDD → SpecDD → TestDD) for Claude Code.

plugins.name: pf
plugins.description: Preview Forge — PreviewDD → SpecDD → TestDD pipeline: 144 Opus 4.7 personas turn one-line ideas into frozen full-stack apps via 15 /pf:* slash commands; humans only touch the design and ship gates. Built with Opus 4.7 hackathon.
